name: Treasure War
original_name: สงครามเงิน
overview: After the death of her husband, the leader of Loetwara business ring, Erin is being prevented by his cousin from inheriting his assets. At the same time, she needs to not only fight to survive but also preserve everything that rightfully belongs to her son. Everything she is confronted with, work, money and even love, comes seeking something from her. Erin calls all of this the war of money".

trailers.title: Official Teaser สงครามเงิน | เริ่ม 30 ก.ค.นี้ | AMARIN TV
